home.comingSoon: Coming soon — get notified at launch

role.customerTagline: Book services from trusted Welpers in your area. Find help for cleaning, moving, repairs, and more.
role.welperTagline: Offer your services to customers in your area. Set your schedule, set your rates, and get paid.

copy.customer: Thank you for your interest in Welpco! We are so excited to introduce you to our platform and help relieve some of your daily stress by freeing up more of your time for what makes you happy! Please leave us your email address and we will notify you once we launch our platform. You will also receive an email confirming your email address has been received in addition to some information regarding what Welpco entails.
copy.welper: Thank you for your interest in Welpco! We are so excited to introduce you to our platform and get you started earning money doing what you enjoy with the flexibility of creating your own schedule! Please leave us your email address and we will notify you once we launch our platform. You will also receive an email confirming your email address has been received in addition to some information regarding what Welpco entails.
